description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a complex, multi-hipped roof in a dark gray color. The exterior walls are constructed from red brick, giving the house a traditional and sturdy appearance. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on the upper and lower floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The main entryway features a single door with a small set of steps and a paved stone porch, providing a welcoming entrance. The rear of the house includes a large sliding glass door that opens onto a spacious tiled patio area. The overall design is compact yet elegant, suitable for an urban residential neighborhood.
description: A two-story red brick house with a dark gray multi-hipped roof, large windows, and a paved entry and patio area.
description_view_0: This view shows the side and partial front of the house, highlighting the red brick walls, two upper windows, and a paved area adjacent to the entry.
description_view_1: The main entryway is visible here, with a single door, two windows above, and a paved stone porch leading to the entrance.
description_view_2: This angle reveals the rear and side of the house, featuring a large ground-floor window and a continuation of the brick exterior.
description_view_3: The back of the house is shown, with a large sliding glass door opening onto a spacious tiled patio and upper windows overlooking the area.
attribute_entryway_design: Single door with small steps and a paved stone porch, no overhang or columns, simple and functional.
